daily_summary.headline: Routine Satellite Deployments and Minor Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 6-110
top_events.description: Launch of 29 Starlink satellites for global internet coverage.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch and booster landing.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: G1 level geomagnetic storm with Kp 4.67, visible at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check skies if at high latitude.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-26
top_events.description: Launch of 25 Starlink satellites for global internet coverage.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch and booster landing.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
